list.title: 现在进行时
list.description: 通过 be + doing 结构识别“正在进行”的动作。
list.learning_tip: 抓住 be 动词和 -ing 形式是识别现在进行时的最快方法。

list.title: 将来表达
list.description: 通过 will / be going to 等结构表达计划、预测和安排。
list.learning_tip: 先找将来标记，再判断句子是在说计划、承诺还是预测。

list.title: 现在完成时
list.description: 通过 has done 结构理解“过去发生、影响现在”的表达。
list.learning_tip: 现在完成时重点不只是过去，而是过去的动作对现在仍然有影响。

list.title: 被动语态
list.description: 通过被动结构识别“动作承受者”为句子重点的表达方式。
list.learning_tip: 看到 be + 过去分词时，先判断主语是不是动作承受者。

list.title: 不定式作目的或补足
list.description: 通过 to do 结构理解目的、计划和补充说明。
list.learning_tip: 看到 to do 时，先问自己：它是在补充目的，还是补全前面的动作？

list.title: 动名词短语作主语
list.description: 通过动名词短语作主语的句子，理解非谓语也能承担名词功能。
list.learning_tip: 句首出现 doing 短语时，不要急着把它当谓语，先看它是否整体作主语。

list.title: 定语从句
list.description: 通过 who / that 引导的从句学习如何给名词添加限制信息。
list.learning_tip: 先行词和定语从句要一起看，但做长句拆解时先抓主句，再补回从句。

list.title: 状语从句
list.description: 通过时间、原因、条件等状语从句学习主从句层级。
list.learning_tip: 主句是核心，状语从句是背景。阅读时先区分两层，再看逻辑关系。

list.title: 名词性从句
list.description: 重点展示 that 引导的宾语从句，帮助学习者理解“整句作宾语”的结构。
list.learning_tip: 看到 know / think / show / explain 这类动词时，后面很容易跟一个完整从句作宾语。

list.title: 比较结构
list.description: 通过比较级和 than 短语学习程度差异表达。
list.learning_tip: 先找到比较级核心，再看 than 后面是谁，最后再看适用场景。

list.title: 条件句
list.description: 通过 if / unless / provided that 等结构理解条件与结果的对应。
list.learning_tip: 看到条件连接词时，优先把条件块圈出来，再回头找结果主干。

list.title: 长难句拆解
list.description: 通过层级较深的句子练习主干提取、从句回填和修饰语剥离。
list.learning_tip: 所有长难句都能先还原成一个短主干，再慢慢把修饰层一层层加回去。

recommended_points.title: 一般现在时与主谓宾
recommended_points.reason: 结合近期错词模式，建议用“一般现在时与主谓宾”补一次句子结构意识。
recommended_points.learning_tip: 先看谁在做事，再看做了什么，最后看动作作用到谁或什么上。
recommended_points.sample_sentence: The new teacher explains the grammar rule in class.

recommended_points.title: 一般过去时
recommended_points.reason: 结合近期错词模式，建议用“一般过去时”补一次句子结构意识。
recommended_points.learning_tip: 看到 yesterday、last week、earlier 等提示时，优先确认谓语是否已经变成过去式。
recommended_points.sample_sentence: The new teacher explained the grammar rule yesterday morning.

recommended_points.title: 现在进行时
recommended_points.reason: 结合近期错词模式，建议用“现在进行时”补一次句子结构意识。
recommended_points.learning_tip: 抓住 be 动词和 -ing 形式是识别现在进行时的最快方法。
recommended_points.sample_sentence: The new teacher is reviewing the grammar rule right now.

recommended_points.title: 将来表达
recommended_points.reason: 结合近期错词模式，建议用“将来表达”补一次句子结构意识。
recommended_points.learning_tip: 先找将来标记，再判断句子是在说计划、承诺还是预测。
recommended_points.sample_sentence: The new teacher will review the grammar rule tomorrow morning.

recommended_points.title: 现在完成时
recommended_points.reason: 结合近期错词模式，建议用“现在完成时”补一次句子结构意识。
recommended_points.learning_tip: 现在完成时重点不只是过去，而是过去的动作对现在仍然有影响。
recommended_points.sample_sentence: The new teacher has completed the grammar rule so far.

list.label: 日常交流
list.mission: 和 AI 做 2 到 3 轮轻松日常对话，重点练习自然回应。
list.coach_focus: 先用完整句表达，再慢慢增加细节。
list.learner_role: 想提高口语表达的学习者
starters: Hi, I want to practice speaking English with you.
How was your day today?
I usually study English after dinner.

list.label: 餐厅点餐
list.mission: 完成点餐、追加需求和结账三个环节。
list.coach_focus: 多用礼貌表达和数量表达。
starters: Hello, I would like to order a coffee and a sandwich.
Could I see the menu, please?
Do you have any vegetarian options?

list.label: 课堂提问
list.mission: 围绕作业、概念不懂和请老师重复说明完成 2 轮提问。
list.coach_focus: 练习提问句和确认理解。
starters: Excuse me, could you explain this grammar point again?
I do not understand the homework requirement.
Can I ask one more question about this sentence?

list.label: 面试沟通
list.mission: 完成自我介绍、项目经历和优势表达。
list.coach_focus: 回答要简洁，先结论后举例。
starters: Let me briefly introduce myself.
One of my strengths is learning quickly.
In my last project, I worked on the backend API.

list.label: 旅行问路
list.mission: 完成问路、确认方向和补充需求。
list.coach_focus: 练习地点、方向和时间表达。
starters: Excuse me, how can I get to the train station?
Is it far from here?
Should I take the bus or walk there?

list.label: 购物咨询
list.mission: 完成询价、试穿和付款咨询。
list.coach_focus: 练习颜色、尺寸和价格表达。
starters: Do you have this in a larger size?
How much is this shirt?
Can I try this on?

list.label: 酒店入住
list.mission: 完成入住登记、房间需求和退房咨询。
list.coach_focus: 练习预订、证件和时间表达。
starters: Hello, I have a reservation under the name Li.
Could I have a quiet room, please?
What time is breakfast served?

list.label: 机场出行
list.mission: 完成值机、登机口确认和行李问题咨询。
list.coach_focus: 练习航班、行李和时间信息表达。
starters: Where is the check-in counter for this flight?
What is the gate number for boarding?
My luggage did not arrive.

data.headline: AI 讲词：combo
data.summary: Combo 是 combination 的缩写，指小型爵士乐团或组合，通常由三到六人组成，演奏爵士乐。

tutor.simple_explanation_cn: Combo 是 combination 的缩写，指小型爵士乐团或组合，通常由三到六人组成，演奏爵士乐。
tutor.memory_tip: 联想 'combo' 像 'combination'（组合），想象几个乐手组合在一起演奏爵士乐。
tutor.usage_tip: 常用于描述小型的爵士乐队，如 'jazz combo'。也可泛指任何小型组合或套餐（如快餐 combo）。
confusing_points: 不要与 'band' 混淆：band 可指任何乐队（包括摇滚、流行），而 combo 特指小型爵士乐团。
不要与 'group' 混淆：group 范围更广，可指任何团体，而 combo 强调小型和爵士风格。

synonym_compare.difference: band 泛指任何类型的乐队，规模可大可小；combo 特指小型爵士乐团，通常更即兴。
ensemble 更正式，可指任何类型的合奏（如古典、爵士），而 combo 更口语化，专指爵士小团体。

tutor.why_recommended: 它来自你当前正在学习的词书，讲清楚后更方便继续推进今日任务。

data.headline: AI 写作批改
data.summary: 你的句子基本意思清楚，但存在两个主要问题：1）副词'very'不能直接修饰动词'like'，应使用'very much'或'really'；2）'learn'应改为动名词'learning'，因为'like'后常接动名词表示爱好。另外，'English'作为专有名词应大写。

result.corrected_text: I like learning English very much every day.
result.overall_feedback: 你的句子基本意思清楚，但存在两个主要问题：1）副词'very'不能直接修饰动词'like'，应使用'very much'或'really'；2）'learn'应改为动名词'learning'，因为'like'后常接动名词表示爱好。另外，'English'作为专有名词应大写。

sentence_feedback.original: I very like learn english every day.
sentence_feedback.corrected: I like learning English very much every day.
sentence_feedback.issue: 副词'very'误用修饰动词，且'like'后应接动名词；'english'应大写。
sentence_feedback.explanation: 在英语中，'very'是程度副词，不能直接修饰动词'like'，应使用'very much'或'really'。此外，'like'后通常接动名词（-ing形式）表示习惯性爱好。同时，专有名词'English'需要首字母大写。

suggestions: 使用'very much'或'really'来加强动词'like'的程度。
在'like'后使用动名词（-ing形式）表示爱好。
注意专有名词'English'的首字母大写。

data.headline: The Importance of Learning English
data.summary: Write an essay on the importance of learning English. Discuss why English is a valuable language to learn and how it can benefit your personal and professional life.

result.title: The Importance of Learning English
result.prompt: Write an essay on the importance of learning English. Discuss why English is a valuable language to learn and how it can benefit your personal and professional life.
writing_goals: Use the simple present tense to state general facts and opinions.
Organize your essay with a clear introduction, body, and conclusion.
Include at least two reasons why learning English is important.
Use vocabulary related to learning and English.

outline.guidance: Start with a general statement about English being a global language. Then state your thesis: learning English is important for communication, education, and career opportunities.
Discuss how English helps in international communication. Use the simple present tense. For example: 'English is the common language in business and travel.'
Explain how English opens doors to education and knowledge. Mention that many books, websites, and courses are in English. Use words like 'learning', 'letters', and 'native'.
Summarize your main points and restate the importance of learning English. End with a final thought or call to action.

result.sample_essay: English is a global language that connects people from different countries. Learning English is important for many reasons. First, English helps us communicate with people from other cultures. In business, travel, and online, English is often the common language. Second, English gives us access to a world of knowledge. Many books, websites, and courses are in English. By learning English, we can learn from experts and improve our skills. In conclusion, learning English is a valuable investment. It opens doors to new opportunities and helps us grow personally and professionally.

scoring_rubric.focus: Relevance to topic, clear thesis, and supporting ideas.
Clear structure with introduction, body, and conclusion.
Correct use of simple present tense and appropriate vocabulary.

useful_expressions: English is not my native language.
Learning is the door to wisdom.
